autoscaling.autoscalinggroup.launchtempl.Description: The ID of the [AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-ec2-launchtemplate.html). You must specify either a `LaunchTemplateName` or a `LaunchTemplateId`.

The name of the [AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-ec2-launchtemplate.html). You must specify either a `LaunchTemplateName` or a `LaunchTemplateId`.

The version number. CloudFormation does not support specifying $Latest, or $Default for the template version number. However, you can specify `LatestVersionNumber` or `DefaultVersionNumber` using the `Fn::GetAtt` function.   For an example of using the `Fn::GetAtt` function, see the [Examples](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-as-group.html#aws-properties-as-group--examples) section of the `AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup` documentation.
